explanation: The diagram shows a clear unidirectional flow: User → Zuul → Service A Cluster → Service B Cluster, with both service clusters connecting outward to Config Center and Eureka. The supporting infrastructure components (Spring Boot Admin, Hystrix Dashboard, RabbitMQ, ZipKin) interact with Eureka and RabbitMQ in what appear to be monitoring/registration patterns. There is no evidence of any circular dependency chain between business services. Service A and Service B have a one-way dependency direction, and no service appears to call back up the chain or form a loop with any other service.
